task: Look in the llm-docs directory and read the local-review-ui-policy-workflow. Review it and summarize it

I want you to interview me, ask as many questions as you need to lock this down and give you enough confidence to build this whole thing out on your own. I want you to break up everything in terms of vertical slices. Ask me questions about the experience, technical details, preferences etc etc. think deeply, do not ask obvious questions.

I want to start off with the authentication layer. Getting that right the first time is the most important part to me
